title: Karen Jones
compiled_truth: Karen Jones is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-08), Karen Jones sent 19 and received 215 emails, totalling 234 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (6), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (6), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (5), [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (4), [Stephanie Miller](people/stephanie-miller) (4).
